## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss performance updates, content strategies, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Performance metrics show positive trends across block pages, per diem pages, and expense category pages](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Content refresh strategy for poorly performing articles discussed; agreed to test full replacements and iterate quickly](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [New SEO strategy for Ramp Treasury introduced with 113 potential titles across 5 categories, totaling \~26k search volume](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Team to create templates for new Treasury content, carefully positioning Ramp alongside bank recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

## Topics

### Performance Update

  - [Block pages: Impressions and clicks rose, maintaining mid-December range](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Per diem pages: All-time highs for impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Expense category pages: Clicks steady, slight increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Bi-weekly analysis post-publishing (5th, 15th):](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
      - [Highest impression bumps: website domain, domain registration pages](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [Odd searches noted (e.g., "ramp.com domain name") leading to low CTRs](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [Highest click deltas: categorizing yields, recruitment expenses, staff duty, cleaning expenses](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Block pages with most clicks this week identified; team to monitor trends and potentially expand on these topics](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Two expense category pages wrongly flagged; tax preparation finished](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [IRS tax payment page in progress, to be completed within hours](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Discussion on rewrite strategy for poorly performing articles:](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Agreed to test publishing full rewrites for some articles](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
      - [For others, minor updates (e.g., adding definition boxes, key takeaways)](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Plan to iterate quickly and monitor performance, with the option to revert or enhance as needed](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

### Ramp Treasury SEO Strategy

  - [5 broad categories identified: best accounts per state, credit unions, best software, reporting jobs, metrics tracking](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [113 potential titles with \~26k total search volume](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Conservative approach taken with titles; team can dive deeper (e.g., "best banks for business current checking for small business in \[state\]")](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Bank-to-bank comparisons to be added, further increasing title topics](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Team to create content templates and test positioning of Ramp alongside bank recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Discussed potential concerns about directing users to competitor products; team confident in Ramp's unique value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Vendor Pages and Tuning Articles

  - [Vendor pages expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Tuning article publishing strategy discussed and agreed upon](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bisera to complete and publish IRS tax payment page](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Victoria to provide feedback on which parts of rewritten articles to keep](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Team to publish and test performance of fully rewritten articles](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Create content templates for Ramp Treasury SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [Schedule call with Daniel regarding Air Ops best practices, including Matt and Abby](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Await list of specific banks from Ally for comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/6JB42Egokis6ErDa-k7htX4FWENsnVCG?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
